zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Keurden於1489年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾霍利時，她的父親Edmund Kuerden44歲，母親Elizabeth Aynesworth35歲。她於1509年與Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Keurden was born in 1489, in Chorley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Kuerden, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Aynesworth, was 35. She married Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock in 1509, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1571, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Keurden est née en 1489, à Chorley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Kuerden, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aynesworth, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock en 1509, à Cuerden, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1571, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ko.St Saviour's Church, Aughton by Lancaste: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오그h턴 비 랭커스터 스트 서아비오우'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Keurden(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 초를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Kuerden(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Aynesworth(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c르든에서 Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Keurden nasceu em 1489, em Chorley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Kuerden, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aynesworth, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock em 1509, em Cuerden, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1571, em Blendon, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.St Saviour's Church, Aughton by Lancaste: ст савиоур'с чурч, аугтон би ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Keurden родилась в 1489 г. в местности чаурли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Kuerden было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aynesworth, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock в 1509 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1571 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

Se casó con Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock en 1509, en Cuerden, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1571, en Blendon, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
